NCT04181827.name: CARTITUDE-4
NCT04181827.group: RRMM after 1-3 prior lines, cilta-cel (single infusion) vs SoC (PVd or DPd)
NCT04181827.snippet: Source: San-Miguel J et al. N Engl J Med 2023;389:335-347 (CARTITUDE-4).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 419 adults with lenalidomide-refractory RRMM after 1-3 prior lines of therapy were randomized 1:1 open-label (ITT: 208 cilta-cel arm, 211 SoC arm); 208 patients received cilta-cel single infusion (per protocol), and the primary PFS analysis was on the ITT population. SoC was (pomalidomide-bortezomib-dex or daratumumab-pomalidomide-dex; n=211).

evidence.label: Primary - Progression-Free Survival
evidence.text: At median follow-up 15.9 months, median PFS not reached with cilta-cel vs 11.8 months with SoC; PFS events 45/208 vs 106/211; hazard ratio 0.26 (95% CI 0.18 to 0.38; P<0.0001). PFS benefit consistent across subgroups.

evidence.label: Secondary - Overall Response and Safety
evidence.text: Overall response rate: cilta-cel 85% vs SoC 67%. sCR/CR rate: 73% vs 22%. Grade 3-4 cytokine release syndrome 1.1%; grade 3-4 neurotoxicity 2.8%; treatment-related mortality 1.4%.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - IRT randomization. D2 SOME CONCERNS - open-label design (cilta-cel is a single infusion, SoC triplet is ongoing oral/IV). D3 LOW - 91% primary follow-up. D4 LOW - independent review committee for PFS. D5 LOW - SAP locked.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Measurable disease at screening as defined by any of the following: (a) Serum monoclonal paraprotein (M-protein) level greater than or equal to (>=) 0.5 gram per deciliter (g/dL) or urine M-protein level >=200 milligram (mg)/24 hours; or (b) Light chain multiple myeloma without measurable M-protein in the serum or the urine: Serum free light chain >=10 mg/dL and abnormal serum free light chain ratio~* Have received 1 to 3 prior lines of therapy including a proteasome in...

NCT03651128.name: KarMMa-3
NCT03651128.group: RRMM after 2-4 prior lines (triple-class exposed), ide-cel vs SoC (DPd, DVd, IRd, Kd, EPd)
NCT03651128.snippet: Source: Rodriguez-Otero P et al. N Engl J Med 2023;388:1002-1014 (KarMMa-3).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 386 adults with triple-class-exposed RRMM after 2-4 prior regimens randomized 2:1 open-label to ide-cel (single infusion, n=254) or physicians choice SoC (5 options: DPd, DVd, IRd, Kd, EPd; n=132).

evidence.label: Primary - Progression-Free Survival
evidence.text: At median follow-up 18.6 months, median PFS ide-cel 13.3 months vs SoC 4.4 months; PFS events 120/254 vs 93/132; hazard ratio 0.49 (95% CI 0.38 to 0.65; P<0.001). Benefit consistent across subgroups.

evidence.label: Secondary - ORR and Safety
evidence.text: Overall response rate: ide-cel 71% vs SoC 42%. CR or better: 39% vs 5%. Grade 3-4 CRS 5.5%; grade 3-4 neurotoxicity 3.1%; 3 treatment-related deaths.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - IRT randomization stratified by prior lines and refractory status. D2 SOME CONCERNS - open-label by necessity (CAR-T single infusion vs multi-agent regimen). D3 LOW - 92% completion. D4 LOW - IRC-adjudicated PFS. D5 LOW - SAP locked.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~Subjects must satisfy the following criteria to be enrolled in the study:~1. Subject is ≥ 18 years of age at the time of signing the informed consent form (ICF).~2. Subject must understand and voluntarily sign an ICF prior to any study-related assessments/procedures being conducted.~3. title: RapidMeta Oncology | CAR-T in Relapsed/Refractory Multiple Myeloma v1.0
